ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "board_reference" TEXT /* Reference designation of the component on the board */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name and description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., DIP, SOP, BGA) */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint of the component on the PCB */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for component delivery */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email for technical support */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the manufacturer based on performance and reliability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boards" (
  "board_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each board */,
  "board_name" TEXT /* Name of the board */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the board */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designer of the board */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the board was manufactured */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the board belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the board (e.g., design, production, testing) */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the board design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boards_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the designer belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the designer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization (e.g., FPGA, PCB design) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used */,
  "board_id" INTEGER /* ID of the board the component is used in */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the board */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was used */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the component on the board (e.g., U13, R22) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component usage (e.g., planned, used, replaced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_board_id FOREIGN KEY ("board_id") REFERENCES boards ("board_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component in stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component available in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the physical location of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger a procurement request */,
  "max_stock" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level to prevent overstocking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, procurement, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the supplier based on performance and reliability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
